$schema.description: URL of the JSON Schema for this frontmatter

title.description: The page title displayed in the sidebar, browser tab, and heading

description.description: Page description used for SEO meta tags and search indexing

icon.description: Icon name from the configured icon library (e.g. "rocket", "home")

sidebarTitle.description: Override the title shown in the sidebar navigation

tag.description: Badge label displayed next to the page title in the sidebar

gridGap.description: Override the grid gap (in pixels) between content and sidebar columns

hidden.description: Hide the page from sidebar navigation and search results

noindex.description: Prevent search engines from indexing this page

robots.description: Custom robots meta tag value (e.g. "noindex, nofollow")

og:image:width.description: Open Graph image width in pixels

og:image:height.description: Open Graph image height in pixels

twitter:image:width.description: Twitter card image width in pixels

twitter:image:height.description: Twitter card image height in pixels

cache-control.description: Raw Cache-Control header value for this page (e.g. "s-maxage=0, no-store")
